parameters.name: text_prompts
parameters.value: [{"text": "={{ $json.frames[0].prompt }}, photorealistic, ultra realistic, 8K, RAW photo, realistic skin texture, natural lighting, film grain", "weight": 1}, {"text": "blurry, cartoon, illustration, artificial, fake, distorted, low quality, watermark", "weight": -1}]

parameters.command: cd /app/remotion && npx remotion render Video.tsx out.mp4 --frames 0-{{ $json.frames.length * 30 }}
